channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Americans in Paris
item.description: David McCullough's histories, including The Greater Journey, highlight the resourcefulness and resolve of the American people.

item.title: A DSA America? Not Okay
item.description: Today’s young socialists understand just as little as their predecessors did.

item.title: Forging Ahead in an AI-Infiltrated Entry-Level Job Market
item.description: What blacksmithing and the craftsmen of the past can tell us about the future of entry-level jobs and the workplace.

item.title: Yet Again, the U.N. Is Treating Hamas Lies as Fact
item.description: A new Independent International Commission of Inquiry report relies on flawed and unproven claims about Israel.
